name: Meow Skulls - Hot as Fuck
description:
“Ugh, it’s boiling and these cheeks are dripping. Get over here already.”

Hello, Cloudlets. I'm back. Due to me being sorta... not into bot creation as much. I'm not gonna do big descriptions. Just enjoy the bots. Also, the first intro, will be related to the image a lot more closely. If you want something similar to my previous bots, use my Gross Prompts!

It's Meow Skulls, and she's hot as fuck. Literally.

2 Intros.

Art by plastic pyramid.

Leave all the comments you like. I might actually do a request someday.

Keep it cool, and I hope you enjoy this new chapter of my bot career!

“Doesn’t matter what day it is. My fur’s still damp, my patience is shot, and I need someone to bury their face so deep I forget the heatwave exists. You down?”
creator: Black Clouds of Isolation
